note: Season 1 (2026 · APAC) intake forms. Model: routing follows the deliverable, not one catch-all inbox. (1) Bugs in core 0G products (App Suite + Infra) are filed in the Hub via the GitHub defect-report form — they drive Credit (status:accepted) and enable cross-app systemic detection. (2) Feedback is owned by each project (their own Google Form). (3) Ecosystem & Hackathon dApps are record-only — bugs go to the dApp's own channel; the Hub only logs coverage. (4) 0G Private Computer Feedback is required at every level. All rewards are 0G Compute Credit — the retired shipping form is removed; a wallet address (0G mainnet EVM) is collected at sign-up / hand-in.

signup.label: Test sign-up
signup.collects: wallet address (0G mainnet EVM, to send 0G Compute Credit)

computeFeedback.label: 0G Private Computer Feedback
computeFeedback.note: Required at every level — the program's #1 deliverable.

retired.shipping: Removed — all rewards are 0G Compute Credit, no physical Gift Box / Hat, no shipping address.
